Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Scenario Activities Context Order fulfillment in a distribution center Activities Receive Order RO Check Availability CA Reserve Items RI Pick Items PI Quality Check QC Pack Order PO Generate Shipping Label GSL Dispatch D Invoice Customer IC Record Payment RP

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Determine Process Logic Constraints Start Every case must start with RO Sequence RO first CA after RO RI after CA PI after RI QC after PI PO after QC GSL after PO D after GSL IC after PO or D RP after IC

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Frequency Occurrences RO Exactly 1 CA Exactly 1 RI Exactly 1 PI Exactly 1 QC Exactly 1 PO Exactly 1 GSL Exactly 1 D Exactly 1 IC Exactly 1 RP Exactly 1 SelfCorrection for standard Happy Path define as 1

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Equivalence Two activities same occurrences Decision CA RI as Check and Reserve tightly coupled If check then reserve if reserve then checked

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Always Before RO before CA CA before RI RI before PI PI before QC QC before PO PO before GSL GSL before D PO before IC IC before RP Always After inverse CA after RO RI after CA etc

Name: Validation - IND
Text: Never Together cannot co exist Decision empty set as all activities part of successful fulfillment flow no exclusions among listed activities

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: DirectlyFollows RO CA CA RI RI PI PI QC QC PO PO GSL GSL D multiple revisions on IC RP position conflict PO to GSL and PO to IC Revised to linear chain RO CA RI PI QC PO GSL D IC RP or prioritize physical flow use always after for billing

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Final Review Dictionary Structure keys match prompt values sets of tuples for constraints activ freq dict with sets of integers SelfCorrection on equivalence never together activ freq Double check prompt requirements
